76ers' Rookie VJ Edgecombe Posts Historic 30-10 Game to Even Series vs Celtics | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January | YES | HIGH**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, driving ETH price up 7% to nearly $2,400 amid a broader crypto market cap rise to $2.6 trillion.[1]
